columns.name: refTime
columns.description: Epoch timestamp (seconds) of the anomaly event from Commvault.

columns.name: anomalyType
columns.description: Bitfield integer identifying the anomaly type(s). Bit 64=Ransomware, Bit 8192=VSA Attack.

columns.name: client
columns.description: Nested object containing clientName and clientId.

dataFlows.transformKql: source | extend TimeGenerated = iff(isnull(refTime), now(), todatetime(1s * tolong(refTime))) , RefTime = tolong(refTime) , AnomalyType = toint(anomalyType) , CreateCount = toint(createCount) , DeleteCount = toint(deleteCount) , ModCount = toint(modCount) , RenameCount = toint(renameCount) , InfectedFilesCount = toint(infectedFilesCount) , ApplicationSizeMB = todouble(applicationSizeMB) , BackupSizeMB = todouble(backupSizeMB) , Location = tostring(location) , ClientName = tostring(parse_json(client).clientName) , ClientId = toint(parse_json(client).clientId) | project TimeGenerated , RefTime , AnomalyType , CreateCount , DeleteCount , ModCount , RenameCount , InfectedFilesCount , ApplicationSizeMB , BackupSizeMB , Location , ClientName , ClientId
